data.title: Eli Lilly Direct-To-Consumer Push Shouldn't Worry Distributors: JPMorgan
data.description: Teladoc Health is integrating LillyDirect into its Chronic Care Weight Management program, potentially boosting enrollments.

data.title: What's Going On With Blink Charging Stock Today?
data.description: Blink Charging's unit Envoy launches EV car-sharing service at The Modern Seattle, marking a key expansion in the Pacific Northwest.

data.title: XRP Fails To Rally After Bitcoin Reserve Announcement: What Is Going On?
data.description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is trading sideways on Friday, with the strategic Bitcoin reserve executive order yet to kickstart a rally.

data.title: Cannabis Co. MariMed Finalizes $11M Deal To Acquire First State Compassion
data.description: MariMed acquires First State Compassion, expanding its cannabis footprint in Delaware ahead of adult-use sales.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson Stops Late-Stage Depression Study Over 'Insufficient Efficacy'
data.description: Johnson & Johnson discontinues aticaprant's Phase 3 trial but explores future options. Another depression drug Spravato sales hit $1.01 billion
